compiled_state.title: Implement REBASE_HEAD incoming-only file exclusion in compute-diff-hash.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add REBASE_HEAD detection after existing MERGE_HEAD block (~line 156) in plugins/dso/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh. Mirror the MERGE_HEAD pattern:

1. Detect $(git rev-parse --git-dir)/REBASE_HEAD
2. Read onto from rebase-merge/onto or rebase-apply/onto
3. Read orig-head from rebase state dir (rebase-merge/orig-head or rebase-apply/orig-head), NOT ORIG_HEAD ref
4. Compute merge base between orig-head and onto
5. Scope diff to worktree-branch files (merge-base..orig-head)
6. Fail-open: if onto/orig-head missing or merge-base fails, fall through to default hash computation

Use git rev-parse --git-dir for per-worktree paths.

## TDD Requirement
The 2 RED tests from task 61eb-5a1c turn GREEN: hash excludes incoming-only files and is stable across rebase boundary.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] REBASE_HEAD detection in compute-diff-hash.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'REBASE_HEAD' plugins/dso/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh
- [ ] Reads onto from rebase state dir
  Verify: grep -q 'rebase-merge/onto\|rebase-apply/onto' plugins/dso/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh
- [ ] Uses git rev-parse --git-dir
  Verify: grep -c 'git rev-parse --git-dir' plugins/dso/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: ! grep -q 'compute-diff-hash.*\[test_hash_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
